---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition to Vestrix
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or limitation you've run into.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Scope check**
Please confirm this stays within Vestrix's stated scope (see `docs/NON-GOALS.md`) — security-first, forensic-grade, SOC-native CSI intrusion detection. Feature requests that broaden scope into general-purpose WiFi sensing (gesture recognition, vitals, etc.) are likely out of scope unless they directly serve intrusion detection.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant — links to papers, prior art, similar features in other tools.
